name: Check of displaying the search field after search a book in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Check of displaying the search field after search a book in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search for "Book" and save bookName as 'BookNameInfo'
Then  The search field is displayed and contains 'BookNameInfo' book

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of displaying the search field after search a book in LYRASIS
